dct_title_s: [Set of maps of Palestine, Mount Sinai, and Arabia Petraea]
dct_description_sm: Relief shown pictorially and by hachures.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
4 bar scales on map given in "Geographical miles", "Feet", "Engl. feet", "Roman miles".
Shows topography, drainage, roads, travel routes, places of historical interest.
Map [6] has 3 inset maps: Region between Cairo and Suez -- Plan of Petra from Laborde -- Pass of 'Akabah.

[1] Sinai / H. Kiepert del ; H. Mahlmann -- [2] Temple-area : ancient vaults / F. Catherwood del. -- [3] Tomb of Helena -- [4] Plan of Jerusalem : sketched from Sieber and Catherwood, corrected by the measurements of Robinson and Smith / drawn by H. Kiepert -- [5] Environs of Jerusalem : from the routes and observations of Robinson and Smith / drawn by H. Kiepert -- [6] Map of the peninsula of Mount Sinai and Arabia Petraea : from the itineraries of E. Robinson and E. Smith / constructed and drawn by H. Kiepert ; engr. on stone by H. Mahlmann.
